news.title: Trump says Iranian negotiators 'better get serious soon, before it is too late'
news.summary: The comments come amid ongoing confusion over whether the U.S. and Iran have held negotiations over ending the war. Trump's comments come as the White House continues to investigate the claims. The White House has not commented on the reports.

news.title: Meta's court defeats add to Zuckerberg's recent woes, represent 'watershed event' for social media
news.summary: Meta suffered stinging defeats in two separate trials involving child safety that underscore shifting public sentiment toward the social media industry. The social media giant was found guilty in both cases of child safety violations.

news.title: Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much higher than Fed estimate
news.summary: The forecast is a sharp step up from the prior projection of 2.8%. Moreover, it is much higher than the 2.7% Fed officials estimated.

news.title: Iran war will spare no major economy, says OECD — but the UK is more vulnerable than others
news.summary: The U.K. is predicted to be worse hit by the Iran war than its developed market counterparts. The OECD said in its interim economic outlook on Thursday.

news.title: What comes next? Three attack scenarios as U.S. sends thousands more troops to Middle East
news.summary: One of Iran's top lawmakers has said that they were anticipating a potential ground invasion of one of the country's islands. One of the top lawmakers said that the country was preparing for a ground invasion.

news.title: An older relative wants to give my daughter $19,000 when she turns 18. I said no. Who’s right?
news.summary: “We don’t think it’s healthy for very young adults to have access to large sums of money without working for it,” he says.

news.title: Here’s what airlines are offering passengers trapped in long TSA lines — and why travelers won’t get much else
news.summary: Airlines are making it easier and less expensive to change flights. Some airlines are also making it cheaper and easier to get a new flight.

news.title: Micron’s stock falls further, but this analyst says bears are missing the point
news.summary: Investors are getting spooked about the historically cyclical memory market. But trends are “anything but normal” this time around, Morgan Stanley said.

news.title: This ‘single greatest’ stock-market predictor has never been more bearish
news.summary: Retail investors have loaded up on stocks, which is typical before a bull market peaks. The U.S. stock market is expected to reach a record high in the coming months.

news.title: Your stock portfolio soared on cheap risk — but now that moneymaker is done
news.summary: Investors are waking up to the harsh realities and the financial penalties of a reordered, reactionary world. The world is becoming more reactionary, and investors are paying the price.
